introDialogue.speaker: Lumi
introDialogue.text: Where am I?… Are you Little Red Riding Hood? Why are you sad?

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: Oh Lumi, I am so sad! The wicked Lord Tempus has mixed up my whole story. Help me put it back in order!

introDialogue.speaker: Lumi
introDialogue.text: Don't be sad, I'll help you! Together we'll put everything back in the right place.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: Thank you, Lumi! Let's head to the path so we can put the events in order at each stop. Let's begin!

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: We're at Mother's house and she's preparing a basket with food and bread for Grandmother, who is ill. Help me put my actions in the right order before I leave!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done! Now Mother gives you the basket, you put on your cloak, and finally you leave the house!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Hooray Lumi, you were so fast! Now I can go. Remember: before leaving home you must always get ready properly!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Done! Now Mother gives you the basket, you put on your cloak, and finally you leave the house!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Well done Lumi, you saw that trying again worked! Remember: before leaving home you must always get ready properly!

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I set off into the woods. The sun is shining, there are colorful flowers, little birds and butterflies. But I got distracted picking flowers… help me put this walk in order?

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Here we go! First you walked, then you saw the flowers, you stopped to pick them, and you wandered off the path.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Amazing work, perfect! I learned that if you get distracted you can lose the right way.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Here we go! First you walked, then you saw the flowers, you stopped to pick them, and you wandered off the path.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Great job Lumi, you were brave to try again! I learned that if you get distracted you can lose the right way.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: A wolf appears on the path and starts talking to me. I tell him I'm going to my sick grandmother. The wolf seems curious but not scary. Shall we put our meeting in order?

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: All set! The wolf comes closer, talks to you, and finds out where Grandmother lives.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: What a team we are! You must be careful around strangers.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: All set! The wolf comes closer, talks to you, and finds out where Grandmother lives.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Together we did it, great job sticking with it! You must be careful around strangers.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: The wolf runs through the woods and reaches Grandmother's house before me. He wants to get there first! Let's put his actions in order to see what he does!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: The events are in order: the wolf runs through the trees, sees the cottage, and knocks on the door.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Awesome, perfect sequence! The wolf was clever—sometimes shortcuts hide nasty tricks.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: The events are in a row: the wolf runs through the trees, sees the cottage, and knocks on the door.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Challenge passed, fantastic that we tried again! The wolf was clever—sometimes shortcuts hide nasty tricks.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: The wolf goes inside and dresses up as Grandmother. He puts on her nightcap and nightgown, then gets into bed and waits for me. Help me, Lumi!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: All in order! The wolf takes the clothes, puts on the nightcap, and slips under the covers.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: You're amazing Lumi! Now I know things aren't always what they seem at first.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: All in order! The wolf takes the clothes, puts on the nightcap, and slips under the covers.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Giving up is never the answer—we did it! Now I know things aren't always what they seem at first.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I finally reach Grandmother's house. I knock on the door and hear a strange voice inside telling me to come in. Shall we put my entrance in order?

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done: you open the door, listen in and try to investigate, then go toward the bed.

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Hooray, perfect on the first try! I learned you must always trust your feelings when something seems strange.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Done: you open the door, put the basket on the table, and go toward the bed.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Wonderful—we learn from mistakes! I learned you must always trust your feelings when something seems strange.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I go up to the bed and look at Grandmother, but something doesn't feel right. She seems different than usual… Help me put the moments of my discovery in order!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: Done! First you look at the huge ears, then the big eyes, and finally the mouth full of teeth!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: What a detective, Lumi! Asking questions is the best way to discover the truth.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Look! First you see the huge ears, then the big eyes, and finally the mouth full of teeth!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Together we're so strong, good job trying again! Asking questions is the best way to discover the truth.

introDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
introDialogue.text: I'm very scared, but help arrives in time. The wolf is stopped and Grandmother and I are safe. Shall we put the last events in order?

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_success.text: The events are set: the hunter drives off the wolf, Grandmother is saved, and you celebrate!

rewardDialogue_success.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_success.text: Such happiness, Lumi! We won! Always remember that together we're strong and we can overcome any danger.

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue_retry.text: The events are set: the hunter drives off the wolf, Grandmother is saved, and you celebrate!

rewardDialogue_retry.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue_retry.text: Wonderful Lumi. It took one more try! Always remember that together we're strong and we can overcome any danger.

rewardDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue.text: Look at the sky, Lumi, it's shining again! All the memories are in place and the spell is gone.

rewardDialogue.speaker: Lumi
rewardDialogue.text: We did it! It was wonderful helping you put your story back in order.

rewardDialogue.speaker: Little Red Riding Hood
rewardDialogue.text: You're a fantastic companion, Lumi. Now you can read my whole story, and remember my other friends need your help too—but thank you again, see you soon!
